changes: Replaced old Header with ScreenHeader (back chevron + Shuffle IconButton on right). Subtitle now shows 'N em quadra . N no banco' from result data. BuildOptions restyled to white card (surface bg, shadow-md, radius 16) with sliders-horizontal icon + 'Opcoes de montagem' title, 3 Segmented controls (mode row + size|bench row side by side), and mode description text. Default team names set to Furacao/Tubaroes per print. Team panels rendered in CSS grid (2col gap-3) instead of flex. Bench section uses er-sect pattern (display title + count). Bottom dock uses gradient fade background matching UI kit er-dock pattern with Flag icon on Registrar resultado button. Hint text matches UI kit wording. All hooks/state/navigation preserved.
